{{Infobox character
| name = Luminous Queen Sha Miara
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
| name = Luminous Queen Sha Miara
| aliases = Sha Miara, Miara
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Luminous Queen, Queen of the Ninecloud Court, Monarch, Underlady, team captain
| abilities = Path of Celestial Radiance, Forge a sword of blinding rainbow light, royal madra, rainbow-light disguise
| affiliations = Ninecloud Court, Ninecloud Court team
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Luminous Queen Sha Miara Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Sha Miara is the [[Luminous Queen]] of the [[Ninecloud Court]]. While she publicly maintains a disguise to appear as an [[Underlady]] from a distant branch of her royal family, she is actually the true [[Monarch]] of her people. This deception was implemented to hide the fact that she inherited her position at the age of twelve following the injury and premature passing of her mother, Sha Leiala. To preserve the illusion of her mother's continued rule, the [[Sha family]] uses a shimmering rainbow-colored [[madra]] disguise to represent the former queen. Sha Miara's power is characterized by [[royal madra]] that manifests as vibrant, multi-colored light. Although her actual power was sealed down to the [[Underlord]] level, she possesses physical and spiritual capabilities that reach the limits of her soul and body. She is associated with the [[Path of Celestial Radiance]] and has access to [[the Queen]]'s [[Gift]], a divine treasure that allows others to utilize her political and conceptual authority. Despite her high status, she has been described as having a youthful or even whiny temperament in certain social contexts. In combat and political maneuvering, she has been known to use her [[rainbow madra]] for defense, such as creating barriers or redirecting attacks, though she has also demonstrated a capacity for desperation and betrayal when facing overwhelming threats.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Luminous Queen Sha Miara]] is a girl of ten or eleven years old with fiery red hair wrapped in glistening peacock feathers.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Luminous Queen Sha Miara]] follows the [[Path of Celestial Radiance]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Luminous Queen Sha Miara]] can Forge a [[sword]] of blinding rainbow light.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11" />}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Sha Miara is [[the Queen]] of the [[Ninecloud Court]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Luminous Queen Sha Miara]] is one of the powerful people [[Lindon]] saw in his vision.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Having inherited her [[Monarch]]'s power at the age of twelve, Sha Miara was crowned as the [[Luminous Queen]] two years before these events. During her time as a participant in the arena, she was observed staring at the sky while competing in second place. Representing the [[Ninecloud Court]] team, she served as their captain and utilized her [[royal madra]] to solve a puzzle box. Although she is a chosen of the [[Luminous Queen]], she maintained her cover by claiming to be an [[Underlady]] from a distant branch of the royal family.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sha Miara is a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sha Miara had a coronation two years prior to the current events.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sha Miara inherited a [[Monarch]]'s power at the age of twelve.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sha Miara is the [[Luminous Queen]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sha Miara used [[royal madra]] to solve the puzzle box.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sha Miara is in second place.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sha Miara claims to be an [[Underlady]] from a distant branch of the royal family.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sha Miara is a member of the [[Ninecloud Court]] team.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The Nineclouds put Miara as their team captain.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sha Miara is of the [[Ninecloud Court]] and a chosen of the [[Luminous Queen]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sha Miara is a participant in the arena who was staring at the sky.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Crowned in a room recognized by [[Lindon]], the veiled [[Monarch]] Sha Miara entered the competition as a fighter. Although she materialized in her [[Monarch platform]], she restricted her power down to the [[Underlord]] stage. During the crisis involving the [[Ninecloud Court]], which some attributed to her immaturity, she sensed the alarm of the [[Ninecloud Soul]]. Sha Miara utilized her power to cast rainbow light, helping to move citizens to shelter and block stray bursts of energy within [[Ninecloud City]]. Additionally, she worked to contain the ongoing destruction occurring throughout the countryside.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sha Miara had been crowned in the room [[Lindon]] recognized.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sha Miara is a veiled [[Monarch]] whose power is restricted to [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sha Miara is a fighter in the competition.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sha Miara can restrict herself down to the level of an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sha Miara is restricted to the [[Underlord]] stage.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sha Miara is a restricted [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sha Miara materialized in her [[Monarch platform]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The situation with the [[Ninecloud Court]] could be due to Miara’s immaturity.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sha Miara sensed the alarm of the [[Ninecloud Soul]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sha Miara's power provides rainbow light to move citizens to shelter or block stray bursts of power in [[Ninecloud City]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sha Miara was attempting to contain the destruction in the countryside.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Sha Miara wears a shining mask.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Sha Miara is sheathed in rainbows.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Sha Miara hosted a meeting with the [[Monarchs]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|As an ally of [[Reigan Shen]], Sha Miara worked alongside him to ensure the protection of [[Rosegold]]. Utilizing her [[royal madra]], she adopted a disguise made of rainbow light and was relegated to a support role behind the [[Phoenix]]. While following Emriss, she became sheathed in rainbow light and was eventually seen as a trembling lump of [[rainbow madra]] consumed by terror. Despite these harrowing events, she maintains relatives within [[Cradle]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Sha Miara is an ally of [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Sha Miara is working with [[Reigan Shen]] to protect [[Rosegold]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Sha Miara was relegated to a support role behind the [[Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Sha Miara uses a rainbow-light disguise.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Miara possesses [[royal madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Sha Miara possesses [[royal madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Sha Miara followed Emriss and was sheathed in rainbow light.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31">''Waybound'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Sha Miara has relatives in [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Sha Miara appears as a lump of [[rainbow madra]] trembling in terror.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31" />}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Sha Miara whines about having to leave.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Miara. The Ghost is dragging the Phoenix and the Titan closer to Rosegold. Help me redirect them north.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“I have relatives…” Sha Miara began, then straightened herself inside her rainbow disguise and spoke more confidently. “My family is still in Cradle, and I would like to know that they are safe.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
